typecheck.command: uv run mypy src/ && cd frontend && npm exec tsc -b

lint.command: uv run ruff check src/ && cd frontend && npm run lint

nonBlockingIssues.description: JSDoc says 'shortest-column-first' but implementation is round-robin (index % columnCount). Comment misleading.
Dead ternary branch in cn() for VideoTile overlay — both branches produce identical class strings.
Uses standalone 'import type' instead of inline type modifier style preferred by project conventions.
Toggle button position uses hardcoded 'right-[416px]' instead of deriving from PANEL_WIDTH constant.
Gallery bottom padding 'pb-[140px]' is a magic number tied to persistent controls height.
VideoTile overlay className ternary redundant (duplicate of masonry-gallery issue).
Download All button uses sm:min-h-0 which is unusual but functionally correct.
setAutoStartError triggers for ALL WebSocket errors in Creative Spark mode, not just auto-start errors. Mid-session failures show misleading 'Couldn't Start Creative Spark' text.
Error message key inconsistency: gemini_audio.py uses 'error' key, brainstorm.py uses 'content' key, frontend reads 'content'. Gemini-level errors may show as 'Unknown error'.
SharePage converts blobs to base64 via byte-by-byte String.fromCharCode loop. For large images/videos this is slow. Consider URL.createObjectURL.
Share page conversation panel toggle assumes fixed 400px panel width (right-[416px]). Not responsive on smaller viewports.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: WebSocket error messages should use a consistent schema. Currently gemini_audio.py uses {type: 'error', error: ...} while endpoint handlers use {type: 'error', content: ...}. Standardize on one key ('content' or 'error') and document it.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: creative-spark-integration-flows review found inconsistency between src/app/services/gemini_audio.py (error key) and src/app/api/v1/endpoints/brainstorm.py (content key). Frontend reads data.content, missing Gemini-level errors.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: Use inline type modifier (import { type Foo }) instead of standalone import type statements. Multiple features used standalone form despite project preference.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: creative-spark-masonry-gallery used standalone 'import type' in MasonryGallery.tsx despite frontend-knowledge.md documenting inline preference.

rejectedObservations.observation: PANEL_WIDTH constant pattern not documented in frontend-knowledge.md
rejectedObservations.reason: Too specific — a single component's layout constant doesn't warrant library-level documentation. Normal code convention.

rejectedObservations.observation: Masonry uses round-robin distribution instead of true height-aware masonry
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a design trade-off, not a deficiency. Round-robin is appropriate when tile heights aren't known pre-render (images load async). Not a shared-state concern.

rejectedObservations.observation: Hardcoded MIME types (image/png, video/mp4) in data URLs across codebase
rejectedObservations.reason: Already a pre-existing pattern across multiple components. Backend only produces these two types. Documenting this assumption would be premature optimization — it should be addressed if/when new formats are added.

rejectedObservations.observation: Inconsistent safe-area-inset patterns (Tailwind vs inline styles)
rejectedObservations.reason: Both approaches work correctly. Tailwind arbitrary values and inline styles are interchangeable for env() values. Documenting a preference would add friction without clear benefit.
